title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: lightweight, extensible framework for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally with a simple CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, list, pull and delete models from Node or the browser.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; same surface as JS lib—chat, stream, embeddings, model management.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you use Ollama models as LLMs or chat models with LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java client for Ollama; chat, generate, embeddings, model ops with fluent API.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for Ollama; simple interface to chat and generate text.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama written in Go; supports chat history, syntax highlighting, prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that adds a GitHub-Copilot-like sidebar powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats using Ollama models; slash commands, thread support, per-guild config.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that wraps Ollama for CI/CD pipelines—spin up ephemeral LLM containers for testing.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot server that forwards channel messages to Ollama and streams answers back.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + ChromaDB + LangChain to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix expression to build and run Ollama declaratively on NixOS with CUDA or ROCm.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter that exposes an OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app that lets you pick any local Ollama model and chat in the browser.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision an Ollama instance on AWS EC2 with GPU and model pre-pull.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate for Ollama; async client for chat, generate, embeddings and model ops.
